hooks.command: node -e "const c=[];process.stdin.on('data',d=>c.push(d));process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const d=JSON.parse(Buffer.concat(c));const f=(d.tool_input&&d.tool_input.file_path)||'';if(!f.includes('CLAUDE.md'))return;const l=require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8').split('\n').length;if(l>100){process.stderr.write('CLAUDE.md is '+l+' lines (max 100) — trim before saving.\n');process.exit(1);}})"
